info.name: Campaign Performance Intelligence Engine
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Resulticks Campaign Performance Intelligence Engine.
Base URL: http://localhost:8000
Trained Tenant: 00b4e220_6121_4a93_a63f_d0848bd73506

request.description: Check if the API server is running.
Returns service name and version.
Minimal request — email only, no ML scores pre-computed. Ollama generates insights from raw metrics.

request.description: Full pipeline: hierarchy resolution → ML scoring → context builder → Claude LLM. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env.
Retrieve previously stored insights from PostgreSQL by campaign_id.

item.name: Generate Insights from Resulticks DB (Live Campaign)

request.description: DB-driven: auto-fetches campaign data from Resulticks ProxySQL (resulticksjobdb). Use a real campaign_id from campaignmetadata table. tenant_short_code = TenantShortCode from TenantLookup.
Returns all .joblib model bundles with metadata: scope, target, n_samples, val_mae, val_r2, trained_at.

item.name: Get Model Info — BU Scope (Trained Tenant)

request.description: Returns all trained targets for BU scope. scope_id format = {tenant_uuid}_{bu_id}.
Returns all trained targets for Tenant scope.
Returns Industry-level LightGBM model bundles.
Clears the in-memory model cache. Run after retraining to force fresh load.
Direct XGBoost prediction for email-only campaign. Returns raw predictions + normalized scores + quantiles per target. campaign_type_code: M=Promotional, S=Triggered, T=Transactional.
Multi-channel campaign prediction — email + SMS together.
Triggered (event-based) campaign. campaign_type_code=S.

Returns all 13 ML scores without calling the LLM. Use to verify ML scores before generating insights. Includes scope_used, reach, engagement, channel efficiency, audience fit, timing, journey, frequency risk, churn, cross-sell, conversion.
Minimal scoring without pre-computed rates. Rates auto-derived from counts.
Returns banking industry benchmark averages.
Returns retail industry benchmark averages.
Returns telecom industry benchmark averages.
Returns Credit Card BU benchmark averages.
Returns Home Loans BU benchmark averages.
WORKFLOW STEP 1: Get ML scores first. Copy the scores into Step 2.

item.name: Step 2 — Generate Ollama Insights with ML Scores
